# JetLagPro — machine-readable product summary
# https://jetlagpro.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-05-25

> Full detail: https://jetlagpro.com/docs/PRODUCT.md
> Research paper: https://jetlagpro.com/research-paper.html
> Privacy: https://jetlagpro.com/privacy.html
> Data integrity: https://jetlagpro.com/DATA-INTEGRITY-IMPLEMENTATION.md

## Product

- Name: JetLagPro
- Category: Health / travel — chronoacupuncture (timed acupressure aligned to destination time zone)
- Creator: Dr. Steven Schram (Licensed Acupuncturist)
- Website: https://jetlagpro.com
- Contact: info@jetlagpro.com
- Bundle ID (iOS): com.jetlagpro.JetLagPro

## What it does

Native mobile app that schedules reminders for a 12-point acupressure protocol based on the traveler's destination time zone. Includes point videos, bilateral timers, Apple Watch companion, and optional anonymous research participation.

## Platforms (verify against this list)

- iOS 18.2+ — native SwiftUI app (primary product)
- watchOS 11.2+ — companion app
- Android — native React Native port in active parity development; not released publicly yet
- jetlagpro.com — marketing site, research paper, interactive demo (PWA-capable site; not a substitute for the native app)

## Distribution (May 2026)

- Price: Free during the observational research phase
- App Store: submitted for review (May 2026); public App Store URL will be posted at https://jetlagpro.com/#download when approved
- TestFlight (beta fallback): https://testflight.apple.com/join/YZc7jzJT

## Research & data

- Study design: Prospective observational cohort; pre-registered at OSF https://osf.io/jm4w7
- Survey: In-app only (7 sliders based on Liverpool Jet Lag Questionnaire core domains). There is no public web survey.
- Data: Anonymous trip and survey uploads to Firebase Firestore; optional research consent in app
- Integrity: HMAC-signed trip IDs; immutable GCS audit log (see DATA-INTEGRITY-IMPLEMENTATION.md)

## What we do not claim

- Not a medical device or substitute for professional medical advice
- No randomized placebo-controlled trial; observational design with adherence strata
- Efficacy claims on marketing pages are aspirational; primary evidence is the ongoing study

## Canonical engineering docs (separate GitHub repo)

- iOS/watchOS source: JetLagPro (private/public per owner)
- Website repo: jetlagpro-website (this site)

## Site maintenance

- Static assets use cache-bust query params (`?v=...`); bump on deploy when CSS/JS/images change
